productDisplayName: Turtle Men Formal Blue Tie, Cufflink and Pocket Square Combo Set

One set of these to match your crisp shirt and you're all ready to suit up! Be it dinner dates or business meetings, this set is your fail-safe formal accessory option.TieLength: 42.5"Blue tie with salmon pink and oyster white accents made of blended fabricHas an exaggerated herringbone striping patternLoop on tie inner to hold end in placeCufflinksWidth: 3"Matching square cufflinks made of steel with encrusted crystalHinged back to hold the cufflink in placePocket squareSquare handkerchief with a 10" widthMade of blended fabric with a matching patternTie and pocket square careDry clean only
